data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement 'Auto-confirm if customer opted into "instant accept"', but there is no evidence provided that confirms this functionality. The linked use case describes the scenario but does not provide concrete evidence of the system's behavior when a customer opts for 'instant accept'. Therefore, there is a clear gap in the evidence regarding this requirement.
gaps: No evidence confirming the auto-confirmation behavior for customers who opted into 'instant accept'.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
